# Polarion Code Editor Plugin – Shared Agent Context

This file is loaded by every agent in this repository. It defines shared project facts,
conventions, and constraints that all agents must follow.

---

## Project Overview

An OSGi server-side plugin for Polarion ALM. Builds to a single JAR deployed into the
running Polarion container. Minimum supported version: Polarion 2512, Java 21.

## Project Structure

| Path | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `src/main/java` | Java backend (OSGi bundles, Servlet endpoints) |
| `src/main/webapp` | Frontend (HTML/JS/CSS, Monaco Editor — vanilla JS only) |
| `src/test/java` | JUnit 5 unit tests |
| `tests/ui/` | Playwright end-to-end tests (Node.js) |
| `META-INF/hivemodule.xml` | OSGi descriptor — service/component registration |
| `plugin.xml` | Polarion extension points (navigation entries, webapp mount) |

## REST API

All endpoints are mounted under `/polarion/code-editor/api/`:

| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/health` | Health check, returns `OK` |
| `GET` | `/config/list` | List all managed files |
| `GET` | `/config/file/{filename}` | Read a file |
| `PUT` | `/config/file/{filename}` | Write a file |
| `DELETE` | `/config/file/{filename}` | Delete a file |
| `POST` | `/config/rename` | Rename a file |

## Runtime Environment (GitHub Actions)

A fully running Polarion instance is available at `http://localhost` (user: `admin`, password: `admin`).

### Deploy changes into Polarion

```bash
mvn --batch-mode package -DskipTests
/opt/polarion-scripts/redeploy.sh . polarion custom docker
```

The script finds the JAR in `target/`, copies it into the running container, restarts
Polarion, and waits until it is healthy.

### Run Playwright UI tests

```bash
cd tests/ui
npm run test:ci
```

Results and screenshots are in `tests/ui/test-results/`.

## Coding Conventions

- **Frontend:** Vanilla JS only in `src/main/webapp` — no npm packages, no bundlers.
- **Logging:** Use the project logger class, never `System.out` or `java.util.logging`.
- **Security:** Validate all user input at every servlet boundary.
- **OSGi:** Always unregister services and close resources in `deactivate()` / `stop()`.
- **Generated files:** Never edit `.lock.yml` files — they are auto-generated by `compile-workflows.yml`.
